title: [codereview-pass1-correctness] coap_dtn.c:21-56 missing k_mutex_lock/unlock around s_dtn_buf and s_senml_pack
description: coap_dtn.c:30-55 deaddrop_get and similar in confessions_get use s_dtn_buf/s_senml_pack without locking per native.c pattern. P0 race on DTN buffer from CoAP threads. codereview
close_reason: Added mutex protection for s_dtn_buf/s_senml_pack/s_last_confession/s_provider in all handlers; fixed deaddrop_post to parse payload for destination_iid before buffer_message/has_messages_for; implemented confessions handlers with rate limiting; added coap_respond and zcbor parse; fixed all identified races/semantic issues across coap_dtn.c and coap_config.c; ran 3 codereview passes per chunk filing all findings as beads; Zephyr native_sim build and tests pass with no remaining open codereview findings after 3 clean passes.
